problem id: 6d00964a
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(5) AND SHR(4)

examples:
  00110100 -> 00000010
  10001111 -> 00000000
  11111110 -> 00001111
  00111001 -> 00000011
  01011101 -> 00000001
  10100111 -> 00000000
  00011111 -> 00000001
  10000001 -> 00000000

query: 01000100
predicted answer: 00000000
